project.name: Premium Prompt System Shop
project.sourcePrompt: Create a premium shop for selling prompt systems to founders.

productBrief.title: Premium Prompt System Shop
productBrief.summary: Create a premium shop for selling prompt systems to founders.
productBrief.problem: Founders need structured prompt systems that turn scattered AI usage into repeatable output.
productBrief.promise: Present a premium commercial system with clear offer structure, proof, and checkout intent.
constraints: No UI page, deployment logic, or mobile runtime.

audience.primarySegment: Founders and operators buying premium prompt systems.
accessibilityNotes: Future UI should preserve semantic headings and keyboard-reachable actions.

monetization.notes: Checkout is represented as schema intent only.

screens.name: Home
screens.intent: Present the offer and route qualified users to checkout.

components.name: Home Hero
components.purpose: Frame the premium prompt system and introduce the primary purchase action.

components.name: Offer Pricing
components.purpose: Show the core offer, price anchor, and purchase action.

theme.notes: EMOVEL-owned black and cinematic gold theme foundation.

entities.name: Customer
entities.description: A buyer or qualified lead for the prompt system.

dataModel.notes: Planning model only. No database or runtime integration.

exportTargets.notes: Deferred until UI generation is requested.

qaChecklist.label: Generated schema includes project, audience, screens, components, theme, actions, data, exports, and QA.
Commercial intent and monetization path are explicit before UI generation.
